description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle (Vehicle 1), operating in manual mode, was stopped in the right turn-lane behind traffic for a red light on south-eastbound 
8th Street approaching Harrison Street in San Francisco when it was rear ended by an SUV (Vehicle 2). The rear bumper of the Zoox vehicle
 sustained minor damage. The driver of the other vehicle left the scene without exchanging information. There were no reported injuries, and
 the police were not called.
Print
Clear Form
